## Summary

Describe the problem and the chosen solution.

## Verification

- [ ] I ran `npm run verify` or explained why it was not applicable.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavioral changes.
- [ ] I included screenshots for visible UI changes.
- [ ] I did not include credentials, private user data, or Brevyn Official commercial code.
